data.title: Add persistent chat history storage
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `backend`

**Description:**
Currently chat history is only stored in browser memory and is lost on page refresh. Users would benefit from persistent storage.

**Proposed Solution:**
Add Cloudflare KV or D1 database integration to persist chat conversations:

* Store conversations with unique session IDs
* Allow users to resume previous conversations
* Add conversation management (list, delete, rename)

**Implementation Options:**

1. **Cloudflare KV** - Simple key-value storage for recent conversations
2. **Cloudflare D1** - SQLite database for full conversation history with search
3. **Browser localStorage** - Client-side fallback (privacy-first option)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Conversations persist across page refreshes
- [ ] Users can view conversation history
- [ ] Users can start new conversations
- [ ] Users can delete old conversations
- [ ] Privacy: Add option for ephemeral mode (no storage)

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add KV/D1 binding to wrangler.jsonc
* Create conversation management API endpoints
* Update frontend to handle conversation switching
* Consider TTL for auto-cleanup of old conversations

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Medium-High** (database integration, API endpoints, frontend state management)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Medium-High** (requires backend storage, session management, cleanup logic)
* 💎 Value: **High** (foundational feature users expect, enables many other features)
